list.txt: - Beautiful location that was only a 4 min walk to the promenade. What was great were the things that I'm sure everyone is looking for. Clean facilities, hot water, great water pressure, and comfy beds. Sitges group staff was also very friendly and helpful.
- Sehr nette Gastgeber, sehr zuvorkommend. Tolle Lage, 1 Min. vom Strand entfernt.
- Easy check in. Clean. Wonderful location. We had a great time.
- Easy check in. Clean. Wonderful location. We had a great time.
- Great location and well equipped apartment
- Clean and beautiful

- A very tidy and spacious apartment set right in the heart of the trendy & soulful Sitges. We genuinely enjoyed the stay and the communication from our hosts was absolutely great. A high value for money airbnb and can highly reccomend!!

- One of the best locations for an Airbnb I have stayed in. Walkable from so many things, restaurants, city center, the beach and so many other things you’d need to see during your visit. Also the place is spacious and has all you need for a short or long stay.
- Great apartment in a terrific location. The terrace overlooking the ocean was an ideal place to relax and sunbathe. It was an excellent stay.
- The location and the view were fantastic. It was steps to everything beach and restaurants. Apartment was super clean and very comfortable. 2 lounging couches were bonus
- Excellent place, great location
- Das war richtig schön :)
- Lovely apartment with sea view. Very special place!
- Top people and a top property, will only ever use them if I want a Sitges apartment, and would recommend to friends
- Nicer than the pictures - really nice apt and very close to the beach
- Terrific apartment! Such a great location. Clean, comfortable space. We will be back!
- Beautiful space with beautiful views! Hope to stay again soon!
- Recomendable 100% para pasar buenas vacaciones, volveremos. Gracias a Group Bonaire.
- 非常好
- Lovely apartment, well located
- Fantastic stay!

- 2 minute (maybe 1 minute) walk from the beach. 10 minute walk max from the train station. Balcony was fantastic! Great location, right in the heart of Sitges. Easy to get to from the airport, easy to get into Barcelona as well.
- Great place. Clean, close to beach and restaurant. We loved the terrace. Beautiful city.

- We had a great stay at this apartment with our baby. Location is great, just a minute to the beach and the patios were a nice place to spend time. The Sitges Group customer service was really quick and helpful. Would recommend staying here!
- Great location and view from top floor , we enjoyed it the balcony the most all day. The location is close nightlife, could be noisy after midnight if sensitive to noise
- Excellent appartement 👌🏻

- Hemos rentado con Sitges Group cada vez que estamos en la ciudad y no lo haríamos con ninguna otra compañía. Sus apartamentos están todos bien ubicados, decorados con buen gusto y con todo lo necesario para una estancia muy placentera. Su staff ha mantenido un excelente trato con nosotros siempre y nos han ayudado en diferentes cuestiones como ubicar parking cercano, cuidar nuestro equipaje, etc. Recomendamos Sitges Group con los ojos cerrados!
- Bel appartement, très bien situé, confortable et bien équipé. On recommande.
- super logement avec une vue incroyable. je ne peux que recommander
- Everything was perfect.
- Exactly as described. Beautiful. I can hardly wait to come back and next time for a longer stay!!!
- No bsbsusjs

- Super emplacement près de tout et surtout une vue sublime - la plus belle de Sitges - la terrasse est superbe et l équipement est parfait pour un séjour tranquille. Le soir des week ends il y a du monde dans les rues derrière et in peut y avoir du bruit car il y a la fête dans les rues mais le séjour est magique. Je recommande
- Séjour très agréable dans ce bel appartement. Très propre et bien situé. La terrasse est agréable également. Bonne communication avec Sitges Group. Je recommande!

- It was the second time we are using Ribera Group, renting one of their flats in Sitges, with the direct view over the sea. The flat was great, spacious living room, with kitchen integrated, with the main highlight being the windows with view over the sea. Very luminous, great hitting system (useful in winter), good size bathroom. Very suitable for big family. The only downside is the thin walls of the flat, in the entire building, making it easy to hear the other people in the building - but not a big deal. Also the flat is located in a prime spot, in the center, and during the weekend the lively atmosphere or some music from outside can be heard in the flat- but again it is not a huge problem, unless you are a light sleeper. Overall we really love this flat, and would book again of we have the occasion.

- Beautiful, great layout, space and gorgeous terrace. Even in the winter this place is amazing. Location in the heart of town and so close to the beach . And super quiet in the apartment if you think the location is right in the center.
- Apartamento muy céntrico con una amplia terraza en la que puedes disfrutar de unas vistas de ensueño. Todo muy correcto

- We would stay here again in a heartbeat. The location is perfect for all things Sitges (small town beach community). The view and balcony from our living room was a highlight. The space was clean and kept up nicely- difficult to do with beach weather! Sitges group was professional and proactive from the beginning of our booking and helped make our check in easier by keeping our luggage until the apartment was ready- due to our early arrival time. Recommending this space with zero hesitation.

- Great place to stay right in the centre of Sitges. The apartment was lovely and clean, comfortable and well stocked with shampoo, conditioner, cleaning items (dishwasher tablet & washing machine tablet) and amenities. Good hairdryer, plenty of loo roll supplied and the towels are a decent size!! Main bin collection point was just at the bottom of the road, so easy to dispose of waste. The office is within walking distance and despite being right in the mix at this property, it’s very peaceful and quiet. Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
- Great apartment with two lovely bathrooms. Good sized beds too and nice and clean! No street noise audible in the bedrooms which was great
- We enjoyed our stay :)
- Amazing location and a lot of room :) fun trip
- Fantastic apartment, better than the pictures. Comfortable, amazing location, and a perfect place to enjoy Sitges. Would definitely stay here again.

- Séjour exceptionnel dans cet appartement idéalement situé en plein centre-ville ! La vue sur la mer est tout simplement incroyable, un vrai plaisir du matin au soir. L’appartement est moderne, parfaitement aménagé et d’une propreté irréprochable. On s’y sent immédiatement à l’aise, comme chez soi. L’emplacement est un vrai plus : tout est accessible à pied, tout en profitant d’un cadre calme et agréable. Je recommande vivement ce logement à tous ceux qui cherchent un séjour confortable avec une vue à couper le souffle. J’y reviendrai sans hésiter !
- Amazing stay! Spacious and very clean.
- Una estancia agradable, definitivamente volveremos!
- In the heart of old town Sitges and a short walk to the beach. This apartment was so spacious and perfectly located!
- Excellent stay as always with Sitges Stay Group. Very central location.
- Duplex propre, bien équipé, salon et terrasse agréable.
- The apartment was clean and very well located. Beautiful beach view from the front balcony. The host was very responsive with questions and any issues we had. Would highly recommend to others!

- What a lovely, well appointed, spacious, trendy and superbly located apartment. We are worldly travellers enjoining the finer things in life that retirement brings, Business Class, 5 Star hotels and the like however, we were persuaded by our children to give an Airbnb a try and as such this was our first experience. We found our interaction with Sitges Group flawless in all regards, professional, accommodating and timely. The unit itself was spotless throughout, fresh in all regards and spacious. I make special note of the underfloor heating and excellent showers. It’s a duplex as the photos suggest which gives it a nice twist, it’s just 90 seconds from the beach and 120 seconds from the Main Street through the town. We visited in late February and found all aspects of the position very quiet however, for those who know Sitges well you’ll appreciate it’s a party town during the season or specific fiestas, such that the location is within the thick of it.
- great place. very nice terrace. very very close to beach and bars
- Magnifique appartement avec une vue imprenable et des prestations de qualité. La propreté était irréprochable à notre arrivée 👍. Le seul petit bémol est l’isolation phonique.

- We had a great stay. The apartment was as described, well furnished, and accurately portrayed in the photos. The location is unbeatable, within walking distance to all the major landmarks in Sitges and choices of restaurants. We enjoyed having quiet time sitting out on the terrace with the fantastic views of the beach.
- Great apartment and super comms from the company
- This is an AMAZING apartment..absolutely everything about it was stunning .. location especially ! A gem in Sitges !
- Nice stay easy check in
- Great location with a wonderful apartment!
- Super schöne Wohnung, geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Die Betten hervorragend, wie auch der Service und die Freundlichkeit von Sitges Group.
- We loved our stay here. The apartment was exactly as photographed and the location was absolutely perfect for the train to Barcelona; groceries and restaurants. :)Anna
- Great location plenty to do at your doorstep, highly recommended a short stay at this location 1 min walk to the beach
- Great place to stay in Sitges

- A very tidy and spacious apartment set right in the heart of the trendy & soulful Sitges. We genuinely enjoyed the stay and the communication from our hosts was absolutely great. A high value for money airbnb and can highly reccomend!!
- Fantastic stay!
- Excellent appartement 👌🏻
- Great apartment with two lovely bathrooms. Good sized beds too and nice and clean! No street noise audible in the bedrooms which was great
- Amazing stay! Spacious and very clean.
- We loved our stay here. The apartment was exactly as photographed and the location was absolutely perfect for the train to Barcelona; groceries and restaurants. :)Anna

- Nice, clean, and simple apartment with well-communicating staff. It's located like 10ish minutes away from the main Sitges beach but there's another mini beach even closer by. The whole area has a very calm atmosphere and the quality and convenience of the apartment makes it 100% worth staying in.
- Nice place, near to beach
- C’était très bien, j’ai beaucoup aimé l’emplacement
- We loved everything about our stay. The location is a great spot to get around easily and we enjoyed the quiet neighborhood.
- Great Airbnb.
- Sehr gute Unterkunft waren zu dritt alles reibungslos gelaufen 3 min zum Strand
- Magnifique séjour. Tout était parfait. Nous reviendrons.
- great location, responsive, apartment was well set out and had everything we needed

- Nur ein paar Schritte bis zum Strand. Neue Küche mit allem was man braucht. Schnelles Internet und zwei top Bädern. Wir waren mit 4 Kollegen zur Messe da und waren mit dem Mietwagen in 30 Minuten an der Messe. Top. Danke
- Nice apartments, close to the beautiful embankment and the old town.

- El apartamento era muy cómodo y tenía todo lo anunciado en su página, la única pega que le pondría sería que había hormigas en la encimera de la cocina, estaba todo limpio por lo tanto no era por falta de limpieza. La entrada al apartamento es a partir de las 15:00 (a nosotros nos dieron las claves a las 14:30). Mi cumpleaños nos pilló en el apartamento y tuvieron el detalle de entrar en el apartamento cuando no nos encontrábamos allí para dejarme un detalle.
- Fantastic stay cannot wait to return
- We really enjoyed our stay ....the view was brilliant and we had everything we needed ..... We hope to return another time

- We had a great 4 days here with our family of 3. The place has amazing views, right in front of San Sebastian beach. Downstairs there are restaurants and bars within metres of your front door. Old town is a 5 minute walk, and the beach is 100m! Amazing place, and we would highly recommend, and will be back!
- Super apartment with fabulous view, tidy, ideal location
- Tout était bien Merci

- Nice apartment on 3rd floor with everything that we needed. It's located on the cosy Sant Sebastian beach of Sitges and only a 5 min walk to the town centre. Everything was clean and check-in and out was easy.
- tres bon contact, appartement bien decrit dans l annonce
- We really enjoyed our stay ....the view was brilliant and we had everything we needed ..... We hope to return another time

- We had a great 4 days here with our family of 3. The place has amazing views, right in front of San Sebastian beach. Downstairs there are restaurants and bars within metres of your front door. Old town is a 5 minute walk, and the beach is 100m! Amazing place, and we would highly recommend, and will be back!
- Super apartment with fabulous view, tidy, ideal location
- Tout était bien Merci

- Nice apartment on 3rd floor with everything that we needed. It's located on the cosy Sant Sebastian beach of Sitges and only a 5 min walk to the town centre. Everything was clean and check-in and out was easy.
- tres bon contact, appartement bien decrit dans l annonce

- Beautiful location right on the beach with plenty to do and see. We liked how we had a smaller beach a little off the larger strip of beaches in Sitges for a bit more privacy and calm with our kids. Host was very responsive and helpful. 100% would stay there again!

- This was a beautiful space in a great location and at a great price compared to others! It felt like home away from home. The place felt like home and had everything we needed. There’s a great and relaxing living room (with two pull down beds if you need them) on one end with an outdoor patio and a kitchen and dining area on the other. There’s are 2,5 bathrooms in between. We did have a mishap with the front door to the building, but things like this happen and what was important was that the owners/managers were immediately responsive and remedied the situation ASAP. Thank you! I would gladly stay here again and you should too!
- The accommodation standard was top class, and the location and balcony view was amazing. The communication from the Sitges Group was fantastic and very clear. Would definitely stay here again!
- This place is amazing. So central to so many places and the beach. Was peaceful and great for a daily stroll into the town. The management group was responsive and professional.

- Beautiful Airbnb, very clean and comfortable. The folks at the Sitges Group Apartments office are very helpful and responsive. They helped in storing our luggage and offered assistance in booking cabs.

- External door / lock is a bit tricky to get in to the building. You have to push just at the right moment. It took numerous attempts until we got the hang of it. A simpler, more immediately responsive system would be better. Nothing worse than being left on the doorstep wondering how to open the door !
- Fin de semana largo en familia en Sitges

- Perfect location for a very good stay in sitges. We were there for the weekend and had a pleasant stay in this appartement. Easy communication and good surroundings, what a pleasure to wake up and enjoy the beach view. Will definitely come back !

- Staff at the office very helpful and close by. Amazing view and big balcony facing the sea. Spacious apartment for 4 adults but could have fit another couple. Tons of great restaurants downstairs and around, lots of shopping all walking distance. Would definitely come again. 30 min train ride from Barcelona and walking distance from station

- We had such a great time. Such a beautiful place. The view was incredible. We loved walking into town and getting goods at the supermarket or iberico ham. Sangrias up on the pedestrian walkway. Love it!
- We spent 4 great days with family in this nice apartment. Everything went smoothly and can highly recommend the apartment. Nice views, good location meaning everything close by walking or biking.
- Excellent location. Great flat. .

- Very clean, bright, comfortable and spacious apartment with beautiful view of the beach and sea. Lovely balcony to soak up the views and sun. Excellent position for restaurants and old town. Very quiet while we were there.

- Great location at the start of the promenade. Wonderful to hear the sound of the waves from the balcony that looks over the beach area. One level for all, with elevator access is great for mobility challenges. Lots of storage in each of the 3 bedrooms. Bathroom closest to living room/kitchen is toilet/sink, 2nd bath with shower, sink and toilet, 3rd with shower and sink. Kitchen had the essentials and supplies needed for a short stay. Appreciated the counter top/storage and place to hang items at the entry to the unit. Living room / dining area was great for relaxing and a working vacation. Loads of options for restaurants, mini markets in walking distance. Easy walk from train station through the cute Sitges streets. Very responsive check in team. They made it very easy to extend our stay!
- The accommodation standard was top class, and the location and balcony view was amazing. The communication from the Sitges Group was fantastic and very clear. Would definitely stay here again!
- This place is amazing. So central to so many places and the beach. Was peaceful and great for a daily stroll into the town. The management group was responsive and professional.

- Beautiful Airbnb, very clean and comfortable. The folks at the Sitges Group Apartments office are very helpful and responsive. They helped in storing our luggage and offered assistance in booking cabs.

- External door / lock is a bit tricky to get in to the building. You have to push just at the right moment. It took numerous attempts until we got the hang of it. A simpler, more immediately responsive system would be better. Nothing worse than being left on the doorstep wondering how to open the door !
- Fin de semana largo en familia en Sitges

Loads of options for restaurants, mini markets in walking distance. Easy walk from train station through the cute Sitges streets. Very responsive check in team. They made it very easy to extend our stay!

- Very clean, bright, comfortable and spacious apartment with beautiful view of the beach and sea. Lovely balcony to soak up the views and sun. Excellent position for restaurants and old town. Very quiet while we were there.

Excellent property, excellent company - Three bedrooms, all in modern decor with comfortable beds. Two bathrooms with shower, neither is an e suite so accessable to all in the apartment, which is a great feature. Codes for doors so much easier than risking loss of a key. We checked in online via Whatsapp and the staff could not have been more helpful Perhaps provide some more bin bags and a few extra dishwasher tablets. One of my group suggested it would be good if a cheap parasol could be provided which customers could bring to the beach
- Smooth and responsive communication from the first minute to the last. Cozy apartment with unbeatable location.

Lovely stay here, would definitely return. The management company were kind enough to contact us after departure to let - Spacious, clean and modern, fully equipped kitchen. Beautiful bathroom, with lovely walk in shower Nice quiet location. Nothing
- The location was super! So close to the beach.
A fabulous apartment - Great size apartment for 5 people. (2B) Incredibly clean. Excellent staff. I had a few queries prior to the trip and they answered promptly. Would highly recommend
- Sitges i apartmán moc krásný. Celý pobyt jsme si užili. Děkujeme

Un séjour très agréable. - L’appartement est bien disposé et bien propre. En effet, il y a eu aussi un service de nettoyage pendant notre séjour avec changement de draps et de serviettes. (Nous avons passé un bon séjour à 5 personnes pendant 8 jours) La vue dans l’appartement depuis la rue et depuis les appartements voisins est un peu dérangeant(nous étions au premier étage)

- TODO , alojarse con ellos acierto seguro, apartamento cómodo y una ubicación excepcional, el trato de los trabajadores de 10, atentos y simpáticos, también felicitar al personal de limpieza porque es increíble lo limpio que estaba el apartamento, jamás me he alojado en uno tan limpio, ENHORABUENA Lo único pero que le puedo poner es que éramos 6 y solo dejaron dos cápsulas de café

10/10 - Great stay in Sitges - 10/10 - loved everything about this stay. Great Location, right by the beach. 10 minute walk from Sitges train station. Wi-fi was good. They did a great job to sneak in 3 rooms within that space. Very cozy vibes. Nice balcony. 100% will stay again. N/A
- El salón y la cama de matrimonio

Outstanding value for money, great value for money, very responsive staff, will surely book this apartment again - The apartment is just perfect, very well maintained, clean and function, all appliances were new and worked well We liked EVERYTHING

Tiszta, nagyszerű apartman a tengerparthoz közel - Nagyon jó környéken, közel a tengerparthoz és a városközponthoz, a vasútállomástól 15 percre található. Szép tiszta, megfelelően felszerelt apartman. A bejelentkezést egy megfelelően felkészült cég intézi, közel van az irodájuk az apartmanhoz. A kommunikáció jó volt, időben megkaptunk minden információt, a lakásba kódos rendszerrel lehetett bejutni.
- Location, friendly hosts, apartment is fully equipped, also with a small amount of dishwasher tablets, a washing machine tablet, washing detergent and sponge. Very handy! /
Excellent apartment in good location. - A great apartment with a big patio. Everything was clean and the staff very helpful. Great location.

В целом проживание прошло великолепно - Прекрасные апартаменты в тихом и живописном городе Сиджес. 2 минуты ходьбы к морю и чудесной набережной. Большой супермаркет, кафе и рестораны все в пешей доступности. Отличные, чистые апартаменты и есть все необходимое для пребывания. Кровати с очень качественными и удобными матрасами и подушками. В одном из санузлов душ очень маленький и стеклянная дверь к нему неудобная.
- Wszystko super. Warte polecenia. Brak
- Muy accesible y comodo
Epic stay with friends - Lovely place, clean and we had everything what needed for short break All good

- We had a lovely time in this apartment, location is superb 👌 just a short walk down to the centre and beach. Beds were so comfy I wanted to take it home 🤣 The only thing we found was the sofa wasn't big enough, the dining table took up a bit too much room. If the dining table was smaller, a comfy chair could be added. Someone had to sit on the hard dining room chair so we took it in turns on film night. It isn't a complaint just a suggestion.
- Muy bonito y muy cerca de la playa
- Nagyon szép, jól felszerelt apartman. Közel a tenger.

- Świetny apartament ! Lokalizacja bardzo dobra , blisko morza , restauracji , przystanku autobusowego . Jedyny minus brak parkingu dość długo i daleko trzeba było szukać miejsca . Poza tym rewelacja , czysto , duży apartament napewno polecimy znajomym i chętnie tu wrócimy :)
Un apartamento totalmente aconsejable para tu estancia en Sitges - La situación, la calidad del apartamento y la amabilidad del anfitrión. Nada
Really lovely and very conveniently located - Clean . Comfortable beds . Very central

- Отличное месторасположение апартаментов. Удобный электронный доступ и отсутствие ключей делают отдых вдвойне приятным. Обстановка апартаментов полностью покрывает все необходимые запросы. Фотографии полностью соответствуют действительности.
Excelencia - There are no comments available for this review
Penthouse in Sitges - Fantastic penthouse apartment - highly recommended. In the centre of town and two minutes to the beach and rail station. Everything was excellent.
Bona eleccio - Situación, com es l,apartament Cal pujar moltes escales
Weekend Sitges - I felt at home ❤️ -
Czysto, fajne miejsce - Wszystko świetnie

Great weekend for the girls in Sitges - This was a beautiful stay in Sitges and perfect for a girls holiday with plenty room for getting ready and having drinks etc. There was an ironing board and washing machine and everything you might need for a wedding weekend away. The location was excellent too with just a short stroll into town and a view of the narrow street below from the balcony.
- STUNNING APARTMENT, GREAT LOCATION, SPOTLESSLY CLEAN NOTHING- IT WAS PERFECT
Fantastic - The balcony was fantastic! Apartment was lovely and very clean Could have done with a toaster in the kitchen
- Der Blick war ein Traum
Amazing apartment, views and location - Beautiful apartment, incredible views and location. Fully equipped with everything we needed during our stay. Nothing
A great location and nice apartment - Loved two terraces and location A little tired but still very nice
Super tolles Apartment in bester Lage! - Super tolles Apartment in bester Lage!

- A spacious penthouse apartment with views over the ocean. Quiet, comfortable, everything you need in the kitchen, beach towels and sockets in the right places. A big sofa bed, huge terrace and a drying room on the back terrace which is great for putting swim stuff and towels. Excellent customer service with quick responses on WhatsApp. Balcony door didn't lock but the company say they will look into this.
- Position right on the beach. Both

- Расположение супер, интерьер супер. Вид на море 😍.все очень красиво . Рекомендую.потрясающе мягкое постельное белье Можно добавить в квартиру бумажные полотенца либо полотенички для кухни ,их хватало, чай , и два кофе на троих как то маловато . Но в целом очень хорошо. Рекомендую. Я бы вернулась
Escapada a Sitges - La ubicación y la limpieza y modernidad del apartamento Nada, todo muy bien

Exceptionnel - La situation et la vue de l'appartement sont exceptionnelles. Au pied de la mer et en centre ville proche des restaurants, boutiques... L'appartement était très propre, bien équipé, bien agencé avec un penthouse extra. Nous y reviendrons avec certitude 🙏💫 Les services proposés ainsi que la réactivité des hôtes sont à rélever.

All was perfect - thank you! - It was absolutely everything what we liked from communicating before our arrival to the check-out. Place was wonderful and people working was very helpful and thoughtful.
Świetna lokalizacja, blisko kawiarnie, piękny widok - Lokalizacja, wyposażenie
- Très bel appartement, très bien placé, avec une très belle vue sur la mer, appartement très propre, nous avons passé un excellent séjour !!! Rien
- Appartement très propre, très spacieux et très bien situé , parfait !!! Rien
- Super emplacement, appartement très agréable Impeut bruyant les weekends
- la proximité mer et centre ville parfait
An absolute gem of an apartment with the most beautiful view in Sitges! - Location was perfection!
Fantastisch - Top locatie , erg schoon . Geweldig uitzicht. Niets op aan te merken
Reencuentro ideal en un alojamiento a la altura - Una estancia muy confortable y cómoda entre amigas de la universidad. Un reencuentro fantástico en un alojamiento al nivel. Volveremos!
Excelente estadía - Comodidad del departamento y ubicación

- Todo fue genial La cortina de lado del balcón se encontraba rota en el carril por donde pasaba el tiro para poder subir y bajar, tuve que subirme en un taburete y arreglarlo, de tal manera quedó bien para su uso con mucha delicadeza ya que es posible que vuelva a salirse de su carril
Perfect location, lovely apartment - Loved everything about this apartment- fantastic Nothing bad to say
- Inventaire complet, four traditionnel plus micro-ondes, grand réfrigérateur combiné. Propreté impeccable

- Отдыхали в этом отеле с семьей-все очень понравилось. Персонал дружелюбный, внимательный и всегда готов помочь. Расположение отличное: До моря минутка пешком, магазины и кафе в шаговой доступности. В номере была вся необходимая посуда и принадлежности. Чувствовали себя как дома. С удовольствием приедем еще!

Thank you for a lovely experience. - Location was excellent. And the apartment was clean and modern. Lots of attention to detail. And the check-in was so easy. I’ve been to sitges many times, but this is the best apartment I’ve ever rented. NOTHING
We had a great time. We would rent again. - Beach front. We had 3 year olds and it worked well for us. It’s a walk up that’s about it.. just something to keep in mind when booking

Great stay in this spacious apartment - Great Apartment on the 3rd floor with lovely views over the beach and across into sitges. roomy three bedroom apartment with heating and aircon. 2 bathrooms and spacious. was fine for us but there is no lift.

We had great vacation, thank you! - Wonderful view, big and comfortable apartment. It has everything you need. And thank you for the welcome drink and fruits for my cousin’s birthday. Everything was cool! We will come back for sure!

Amazing place to stay in Sitges - It’s very nice place to stay! It has everything you need and amazing terrace. The locking system! I would feel more secure if there was smth additional inside room to lock the door. We were with toddler and I was always scared that e would open door himself because it was super easy to do. An extra chain that can lock door from inside would be great!

Una meraviglia - Spazioso e confortevole appartamento, dalla sala puoi goderti lo spettacolo del mare dai due balconi. Tanti localini nella piazzetta sotto dove mangiare e bere. Il personale fantastico e disponibile. Consiglio vivamente.
Can’t wait to return - Property was in the perfect location. Beach only a few feet away. Restaurants within walking location. The view was absolutely amazing! So glad we found this place.
Vacanta de vis - Ne a placut totul. Atmosfera...zgomotul marii...restaurantele din fata cladirii cu apartam. Avem 3 copii si a fost extrem de confortabil. -
- Everything was great!!
- It was an absolutely beautiful property with the most breathtaking view! We were close to so many amazing restaurants.

Lovely off season beach stay - The location, the views, the vibes of Sitges, the functionality and comfort of the flat. The quietness of off season. The sun and sound of waves. We loved our stay! The stairs with the suitcases- it took quite some climbing and carrying.

- L’appartement est très bien situé et profite d’une belle vue. cependant, les deux salles de bain ont des douches minuscule. La literie et les oreillers sont moyen niveau confort. Tous les quarts d’heure, le bruit de l’enclenchement de la chaudière résonne dans la chambre à coucher. Ce qui n’est pas confortable pour s’endormir. Et pour le repos matinal… Il est impossible de se reposer car il y a des nuisances sur l’étage supérieure. Ménage, bruit de meubles…. Bref… L’emplacement ne fait pas tout ! Il faudrait prendre soin un peu plus de ses hôtes.

- Det var jättetrevligt och centralt boende, bra på alla sätt förutom att det inte ingick tillräckligt med disktabletter till diskmaskinen.

- Nous (3 couples) avons passé 4 nuits en période du jour l'an dans cet appartement. En général, nous avons passé une très bonne semaine et nous sommes satisfaits. un problème de lit cassé réparé dès le lendemain. Les points positifs: - La localisation - La terrasse - La propreté - Les 2 salles d'eau Les points négatifs - nous avons eu un problème de lit cassé, réparé le lendemain. - le manque d'ustensile de cuisine (Fouet, plat four, ...) - l'espace cuisine un peu juste pour 6 personnes Nous conseillons cette location

- Superb beach front apartment, with elevator access. Wonderful to sit on the balcony and watch everyone enjoying the beach, from Tia chi in the morning or volleyball in the afternoon. Kitchen well equiped with breakfast appliances. Excellent sized bedrooms with comfortable linens. Cleaning service provided. Would visit again, so relaxing for us.

- Superb beach front apartment, with elevator access. Wonderful to sit on the balcony and watch everyone enjoying the beach, from Tia chi in the morning or volleyball in the afternoon. Kitchen well equiped with breakfast appliances. Excellent sized bedrooms with comfortable linens. Cleaning service provided. Would visit again, so relaxing for us.

- Superb beach front apartment, with elevator access. Wonderful to sit on the balcony and watch everyone enjoying the beach, from Tia chi in the morning or volleyball in the afternoon. Kitchen well equiped with breakfast appliances. Excellent sized bedrooms with comfortable linens. Cleaning service provided. Would visit again, so relaxing for us.
- Estuvimos muy agusto!
- Amazing apartment, very clean. Had a good time with my family there. Located in the centre of the town, near to everywhere. Just one unlucky point we had a construction around and super noisy..

Beware the ‘lift’ does not go to all floors - Great location We booked an apartment because it said it had a lift. When we arrived there were 10 steps leading to the lift and another 8 steps up from the lift to our apartment. My husband can do a few steps, but not 18. We had to cancel our booking and find another apartment on the spot - not easy!! As the apartment was falsely advertised, we asked for a refund. The Sitges Group manager refused. Booking.com kindly tried to negotiate a partial refund, but Sitges Group manager refused. I even had to fight to get back the extra security deposit they took from my credit card without authorization. Sitges Group has 30+ apartments and don’t care about people, they have no heart. Book an apartment with one of the small local landlords instead.

Scammers - The apparemment is much smaller then it looks on the photos. It is not adapted for young kids ( stairs at the entrance before the lift ) The whole building smells fish because of restaurant. Even the flat we had on the last floor of the building. Not accessible for uber: when you call an uber they never come because the street is somehow closed. You need to order it from another location 500/600 meters away. But you have to find out this place by yourself. The widows were not closing properly. Equipments are very old The company managing does not make a proper check with what is broken or not, and charged us for things that was already broken before we arrived, but hidden. I will never rent again from this company SITGES group apartments!

Beware the ‘lift’ does not go to all floors - Great location We booked an apartment because it said it had a lift. When we arrived there were 10 steps leading to the lift and another 8 steps up from the lift to our apartment. My husband can do a few steps, but not 18. We had to cancel our booking and find another apartment on the spot - not easy!! As the apartment was falsely advertised, we asked for a refund. The Sitges Group manager refused. Booking.com kindly tried to negotiate a partial refund, but Sitges Group manager refused. I even had to fight to get back the extra security deposit they took from my credit card without authorization. Sitges Group has 30+ apartments and don’t care about people, they have no heart. Book an apartment with one of the small local landlords instead.

Normas rígidas que fastidian un viaje - La ubicación Reservamos dos apartamentos para 9 personas para dos días. Hablamos con el personal, antes del viaje, de la necesidad de contar con los espacios del sofá cama de los apartamentos por las circunstancias de alguna de las personas del grupo y cambiamos uno de los apartamentos, pagando la diferencia, para poder cubrir esas necesidades. Nuestra sorpresa fue que uno de los sofás, no estaba habilitado, y no había ropa de cama en el apartamento. Tras muchas llamadas, conseguimos hablar con el personal y explicarle el problema, y no nos dieron solución para ese día, nos dijeron que eran normas de empresa y no podían acercar ropa de cama para esa noche. Pasamos la primera noche como pudimos, incómodas por la situación y por la poca o nula atención. El día siguiente habilitaron el sofá cama. Una pena, el 50% de la estancia fue muy decepcionante.
Bon rapport qualité prix - L'emplacement La mauvaise insonorisation de l'appartement. Des voisins bruyants et peu d'insonorisation avec les escaliers.

Der Blick ist unglaublich schön! Das Gebäude liegt unmittelbar neben der Partystrasse, was am Tag super ist, weil es überall schöne Läden und Restaurants gibt. Lovely sea view apartment. Great service. - I booked a nice 3 bedroom 2 Bathroom apartment for my mother and auntie. They stayed in the Sitges group ocean apartment. It was beautiful and comfortable with sea views and a lift. The staff were very helpful in resolving any problems. I would highly recommend this apartment.

Overall another enjoyable stay at this apartment but a few changes needed as said above - Location is excellent for beach, town and station. The apartment has two terraces and a bedroom balcony. - Czysty w pełni funkcjonalny apartament. Bardzo dobre położenie i wyciszenie odgłosów z zewnątrz. Przy takiej cenie wypadałoby naprawiać usterki na bieżąco. Kabina prysznicowa w jednej z łazienek do natychmiastowej wymiany. Po pierwszym prysznicu cała łazienka oraz korytarz w wodzie. Uciążliwe mycie aby nie zalać apartamentu...
Excellent logement. Je recommande! - Emplacement. Propreté. Taille de l'appartement et équipement. Staff sympathique et serviable Un peu cher

Beautifully renovated and well-equipped apartment in a perfect location a short walk from the beach. - We had a wonderful stay and would highly recommend this apartment. It has been beautifully renovated, tastefully furnished, and equipped with everything needed for a comfortable stay. The location is excellent, right in the heart of the old town and only about a 5-minute walk from the beach. The train and bus stations are also within easy walking distance, making it very convenient for exploring the area and visiting Barcelona. The beds in the bedroom are very comfortable, and the sofa bed is also spacious and comfortable, allowing four people to stay comfortably. We spent our days sightseeing in Barcelona and loved being able to return each evening to a relaxing seaside town away from the city's hustle and bustle. There are excellent brunch spots, cafés, and convenience stores nearby. The beach is beautiful, with soft sand, a lovely promenade, and plenty of restaurants. There are two beach areas within easy walking distance, and the sea was pleasantly warm during our stay. Overall, this was a fantastic place to stay, and we would definitely choose it again. The neighborhood can be a little lively at night due to nearby bars and restaurants, but the window shutters help reduce the noise significantly.

Goods hosts; mid-stay clean/change of linen etc was great; very good apartment in great location. - Excellent location - quiet but still very close to beach and the local facilities. There was no air conditioning in two of the bedrooms, which meant they were very warm overnight.

- Situation géographique Attention aux photos selon l'étage de l'appartement notamment sur les balcons parties extérieures.( 2éme étages pour nous) Vis à vis avec les immeubles situés en face. Bruit dans les escaliers et sur les terrasses des autres occupants de l'immeuble en milieu de nuit

An excellent location by day; the proximity to the bar made it a nightmare at night. - The apartment was great- spacious for 4 people, comfortable beds, and an excellent view from the window & verandah! The noise at night was ridiculously loud. The music from the bar a street over started at 9 pm & went until at least 2:30. It made sleeping very hard. Also, the scant supply of kitchen cleaning supplies. With the money the apartment cost, we should not have been expected to spend another 5 euros to get our requested 2 dishwasher pods!
Excellent - Everything fantastic just one problem . When used the shower - flooded whole bathroom . 3 persons staying so each time used Shower flooding bathroom

- El apartament es molt ample esta molt ben decorat. Molt aprop de la platja, restaurant bars i botigues. El personal molt amable Per la nit se escolta molt forta la música suposo d'algun local sobretot a una de les habitacions.

Een top verblijjf! - We zaten dicht bij het centrum van Sitges en op het balkon hadden we prachtig uitzicht op de zee. Het appartement is schoon en van alle gemakken voorzien. En dat op een top locatie. Eigenlijk viel niets tegen.

Wir fanden den Blick aufs Meer und die Lage großartig. Und das Personal der. Sitges Group ist Super. - Super Ausblick. Tolle Lage Matratze im Masterbedroom war nicht komfortabel. Und der Blick auf den Sichtschutz ich nicht schön. Dadurch ist das Zimmer etwas dunkel. Aber es ist ja ein Schlafzimmer.

- Idéalement situé en plein centre, ce logement nous a séduits par sa propreté irréprochable et son aménagement avec goût. Certes, il faut grimper au deuxième étage sans ascenseur, mais l'effort est largement récompensé une fois la porte franchie : on découvre un appartement magnifique, doté d'une cuisine parfaitement équipée et d'un coin salon très chaleureux, idéal pour partager de bons moments entre amis ou en famille. Mention spéciale pour le chauffage qui, lui, était d'une fidélité absolue : impossible de l'éteindre. On a tenté de le raisonner, de le baisser, de le supplier, mais il a insisté pour nous offrir une expérience de hammam gratuite toute la nuit. On a fini par simuler un système de climatisation high-tech en ouvrant les fenêtres en grand pour la nuit. Écologique ? Pas vraiment. Rafraîchissant ? Absolument.

Nice, clean and funtional place with cute terrace and very close to the sea. Beautiful town Sitges. - It was easy to get into the property. The wardrobes were big and the kitchen had everything one may need, although we didn't really use it. Wifi worked well and the roof terrace was very nice with great views. The property is very near to the sea. The bathrooms were clean and modern. The staff were very efficient in communicating and the check in was super easy. The location is very central and close to all the town's amenities. The appartment was very clean and had all the facilities needed, hair dryer, large fridge and a dishwaser. I loved that shampoo and hair conditioner were provided in the bathroom (bottled and not satches). The property was a penthouse and the bottom of the property has barely any natural light. There are some small skylights but that's it. The sofa bed in the mezzanine was a bit uncomfortable for a couple and if used as a room doesn't have night lamps, anything to hang your clothes or sockets to charge devices. Also, if the mezzanine is used as a third room, there is no other sofa to sit and socialise. The street has several night bars, surprisingly the music can barely been heard with the windows closed, however, when the bars closed and the people were leaving it got very noisy over the Friday and Saturday night (about 3am).
Great location. Needs a bit more of a personal touch - Fantastic location overlooking the beach The amenities were lacking and needed updating. No basics like salt and pepper, sugar were supplied

Nice place and location but relatively expensive - Great location overlooking the sea front. An easy walk to grocery stores and restaurants. Not the property’s fault but it was crying out for a balcony/terrace.
- La vue et l'emplacement exceptionnels. L'accueil avec mention spéciale à Trinidad pour sa gentillesse et ses explications Appartement mal insonorisé avec du bruit venant de l'appartement du dessus

We had a great time. The apartment felt like home and Sitges Group took really good care of us - I liked that the apartment was nicely decorated, clean , and conveniently located. And, that management was readily available to meet all our needs. Unfortunately, the apartment sits over a bar/restaurant and there is another bar/ restaurant across the street. There was loud music and revelry and loud talking until 3 in the morning… we used ear plugs to try to sleep through it, but that wasn’t enough.
- Vistas al mar No tenía ascensor

Great location and well fitted out. So great to have complimentary olive oil! - Convenience, clean, great location, well equipped The terrace was overlooked by many apartments. No small light in the single room.

Tolle Unterkunft in einem netten Örtchen in der Nähe von Barcelona. - Die Unterkunft entsprach unseren Erwartungen. Sie ist modern und sauber. Ideal für einen Aufenthalt mit Freunden. Durch einen Türcode kommt man die Unterkunft wodurch keine lästige Schlüsselübergabe erforderlich ist. Die Küche ist mit allem ausgestattet was man benötigt. Die Unterkunft liegt in dem kleinen Ort Sitges, etwa 40 Autominuten von der Innenstadt Barcelona entfernt. Von der Unterkunft aus erreicht man fußläufig innerhalb von 5 Minuten den Strand und die Promenade von Sitges, wo viele Restaurants, Bars und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten zu finden sind. Wir sind eigentlich für die Stadt Barcelona hierher gekommen, wurden jedoch vom Ort Sitges wirklich positiv überrascht. Ich kann die Unterkunft auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen. Hier gibt es nicht viel auszusetzen. Wer mit dem Auto anreist wird leider etwas Probleme mit der Parkplatzsuche haben.
- The kitchen The old plastic plant on the terrace and the smell of the cleaning products
- La posizione ottima, vicino alla spiaggia e ai ristoranti
Overall very pleased - Close to everything Terrace is overlooked
- Piękne, urokliwe i czyste miasteczko. Lokalizacja mieszkania bardzo dobra, wszedzie blisko
Very pleasant and 2 minutes walk to the nearest beach - There are no comments available for this review

- Penthouse appartement volgens beschrijving. Keuken met alle benodigdheden om zelf te koken. Net. Terrassen waren leuk maar weinig privacy. Beetje jammer dat we 2 dagen na elkaar een probleem hadden met warm water. Anderzijds goede communicatie en snelle oplossing verkregen, zelfs op zondagavond.

lastPos.txt: Excellent property, excellent company - Three bedrooms, all in modern decor with comfortable beds. Two bathrooms with shower, neither is an e suite so accessable to all in the apartment, which is a great feature. Codes for doors so much easier than risking loss of a key. We checked in online via Whatsapp and the staff could not have been more helpful Perhaps provide some more bin bags and a few extra dishwasher tablets. One of my group suggested it would be good if a cheap parasol could be provided which customers could bring to the beach

lastNeg.txt: Scammers - The apparemment is much smaller then it looks on the photos. It is not adapted for young kids ( stairs at the entrance before the lift ) The whole building smells fish because of restaurant. Even the flat we had on the last floor of the building. Not accessible for uber: when you call an uber they never come because the street is somehow closed. You need to order it from another location 500/600 meters away. But you have to find out this place by yourself. The widows were not closing properly. Equipments are very old The company managing does not make a proper check with what is broken or not, and charged us for things that was already broken before we arrived, but hidden. I will never rent again from this company SITGES group apartments!
